zenTribe.pageDesc: Join the Zen Tribe and get access to exclusive content, VIP events, and much more!
zenTribe.subtitle: An exclusive community for true music lovers. Earn points, unlock achievements, and enjoy amazing benefits.

schema.organization_name: Zen Tribe - Global Brazilian Zouk Community
schema.organization_desc: Exclusive community for Brazilian Zouk lovers, offering early access to music, VIP events and gamified reward system.

zenTribe.selectTier: Select the membership tier that fits your journey with DJ Zen Eyer's music
zenTribe.levelUpDesc: The Zen Tribe features a comprehensive achievement system that rewards you for engaging with music, attending events, and being an active community member.
zenTribe.xpDesc: Earn XP for every action you take, from listening to tracks to attending events.
zenTribe.badgesDesc: Unlock collectible badges for special achievements and milestones in your journey.
zenTribe.rewardsDesc: Earn real benefits like merchandise discounts, exclusive content, and VIP upgrades.
zenTribe.streaksDesc: Maintain your engagement streak for bonus XP and special streak-only rewards.

exclusiveMusic.title: Exclusive Music
exclusiveMusic.desc: Early access to releases and exclusive remixes before anyone else.

earlyAccess.title: Early Access
earlyAccess.desc: Buy event tickets before general sale.

merchandise.title: Exclusive Merchandise
merchandise.desc: Discounts on official products and limited editions.

community.title: Private Community
community.desc: Access to exclusive Tribe members group.

behindScenes.title: Behind the Scenes
behindScenes.desc: Exclusive behind-the-scenes content and creative process.

shareContent.title: Share 10 Times
shareContent.desc: Share content 10 times on social media

cta.title: Ready to Elevate Your Experience?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Zen Tribe members and unlock all exclusive benefits!

master.name: Zen Master
master.feature2: VIP access to all live events
master.feature4: Personalized playlists from DJ Zen Eyer
